sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: portable, practical snack food because nuts score real points in life because they are easy to use. fat and texture help satiety because they can hold up better than many snack foods. still a recognisable whole-food option because that keeps them cleaner than most processed snacks.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: calorie density is very high because that makes portion control a real issue. protein is useful but not elite because nuts help, but they are not protein stars. cost or allergy issues can limit use because practical downsides still count.
